sentences.english: Today was field day at school.
We had relay races and a tug of war.
My team won the relay race and we were so proud.
sentences.korean: 우리 팀이 이어달리기에서 이겨서 매우 자랑스러웠어요.

sentences.english: After the games we ate ddukbokki and drank juice.
sentences.korean: 경기 후에 떡볶이를 먹고 주스를 마셨어요.

sentences.english: I wish every day was field day.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
